CHERKESSK, Russia Karachais Russia's North Caucasus region have marked 74th anniversary their mass deportation Central Asia Soviet leader Josef Stalin.
Prayers region's mosques November were dedicated those died during Karachais' deportation Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Uzbekistan between 1943 1957.
leader Rashid Temrezov, Prime Minister Aslan Ozov, parliament speaker Aleksandr Ivanov, issued joint statement November calling ethnic groups region everything power allow horrors repressions anymore."
Karachais small, Turkic-speaking predominantly Muslim ethnic group.
They were first ethnic group North Caucasus deported Stalin's government 1940s.
Between November November 1944, some 70,000 Karachais were deported cattle train cars Central Asia Moscow, which accused them collaborating with Nazi Germany.
According unofficial estimates, about quarter those deported perished during journey.
Those survived deportation were allowed return back North Caucasus 1957.

police helicopter circled above warehouse during stand-off, which lasted nearly hours.
ended when riot cops raided site last night.
witness said: "The travellers Tuesday night using pull away giant boulder that blocking warehouse entrance.
"Once past first perimeter they used bolt cutters break into another fence.
They helped themselves towels, food drink, showers.

Hundreds thousands orders will processed there when opens near future.

American Securities LLC, leading U.S. private equity firm, today announced that entered into definitive agreement sell SeaStar Solutions ("SeaStar" "Company") Dometic Group (STO: DOM) ("Dometic") $875 million.
Dometic global market leader branded solutions mobile living areas Climate, Hygiene Sanitation, Food Beverage.
transaction expected close fourth quarter 2017, subject customary closing conditions regulatory approvals.
SeaStar leading, global provider vessel control, fuel systems system integration marine industry.
Company market leader product areas with strong market shares.
SeaStar today operates some strongest brands market, such SeaStar, xtreme, MOELLER, Optimus, Sierra.
Sierra aftermarket platform world's largest independent marine aftermarket parts supplier.
SeaStar based Litchfield, operates facilities, employs approximately 1,250 people.
proud commitment research development, which allowed regularly launch innovative products," said Yvan Cote, President SeaStar.
"During nearly four-year partnership with American Securities, they have been valuable resource achieving growth objectives.
look forward next chapter growth with Dometic."
Scott Wolff, Managing Director American Securities, commented, proud have supported Yvan talented SeaStar management team drive organic growth execute strategic acquisitions during partnership."
Arnold Porter Kaye Scholer acted legal advisor, Capital Markets Baird acted financial advisors SeaStar.
